account.description: Return the current Spotify account profile.

errors.message: This operation needs a retained Spotify Web Player login or configured OAuth.
errors.user_action: Run agentweb connect spotify to authorize a session once, then retry.

errors.message: Spotify applied a rate limit to this client.
errors.user_action: Wait for the Retry-After window, then retry the same request unchanged.

errors.message: Spotify reported a transient busy or conflict state for this request.
errors.user_action: Retry once after a short pause.

errors.message: Spotify is temporarily unavailable or returned a server error.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same request without changing valid inputs.

errors.message: One or more arguments were empty or outside their allowed range.
errors.user_action: Fix the reported field against the input schema and call again.

account.when_to_use: Use this to read the current Spotify account profile.

constraints: Spotify Connect playback endpoints require Spotify Premium
the normal-login Web Player transport is unofficial and can break when Spotify changes its private session protocol
new Spotify development-mode apps are limited to five authorized users and one Client ID per developer
Spotify policies, scopes, rate limits, device availability, and regional catalog rules still apply
human_boundaries: password, passkey, CAPTCHA, OAuth consent, plan terms, and payment confirmation when Spotify requires them
typed_fast_paths: zero-setup Spotify Desktop playback on macOS
normal Spotify Web Player login and automatic short-lived token refresh for account operations
optional PKCE OAuth transport for users who prefer an official developer application

Spotify Connect devices, transfer, track or context play, pause, seek, skip, volume, shuffle, repeat, and queue through a lightweight direct Dealer controller rather than a resident browser or the separately rate-limited public playback API
Web Player Recents activity plus optional exact recently-played history through official OAuth, and top items
saved library reads and generic library mutations
playlist reads, creation, editing, item add/remove/reorder/replace
bounded authenticated access to remaining Spotify Web API endpoints
coverage.website_parity: A retained normal Web Player login supplies browserless account access, playlist creation/editing, Recents, Connect device discovery, queue state, and verified playback controls without developer credentials. Commands register Spotify's hidden Connect observer directly, so the Web Player does not need to stay open. Local Spotify Desktop Apple Events remain a zero-login fallback on macOS. Optional official PKCE OAuth remains available for exact Web API-only history cursors.

description: Zero-setup local Spotify Desktop playback plus browserless account, library, playlist, device, queue, and verified Connect control after one normal Spotify Web Player login; optional official PKCE OAuth remains available.
name: spotify
